subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Jamal-i-Burujirdi
subcodes.first_line: The Ocean of Divine Revelation which is hidden within the Supreme Pen hath sprinkled forth in the form of these Words: O Jamal! Thou didst arrive in the Most Holy Presence and attain the Most Great Vision
subcodes.first_line_orig: قوله تعالی بحر وحی که در قلم اعلی مستور است بصورت اینکلمات ترشح فرموده ای
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @unity in diversity, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love and unity, @differences in human capacity
